title: GCP-NEON-R2 Hosted TEST Validation
description: Execute the governed hosted TEST validation contract against the Cloud Run, Neon Postgres, and R2 finalist while preserving the current Python runtime shape and measuring three-provider operational consequences.
acceptance_criteria: Google Cloud, Neon, and Cloudflare TEST identities, TEST credentials, and teardown authority are available without production credential reuse
The TEST runtime is deployed through Cloud Run with synthetic governed state only and explicit cost guardrails
Boundary isolation, transaction recovery, portability, privacy-preserving observability, and failure injection pass across all three providers
Cross-provider latency, egress, quota, trust, identity, secret, incident-routing, and recovery evidence is captured
The runtime preserves stable Enki consumer and governance contracts without repository shortcuts
All hosted TEST resources and credentials are revoked or destroyed after the campaign
Final TEST state reconstructs from governed exports and receipts after teardown
